title: Week of March 17, 2026
summary: This week brought major improvements to Salesforce RevOps assessments with automatic revenue field detection and sales process analysis, making it easier to evaluate your revenue operations setup. We also enhanced the OKR generation process with strategic context layers to create more aligned objectives, and strengthened platform security with comprehensive credential protection.

entries.headline: Brand Gallery and Templates now preserve customizations during updates
details: Your customized templates and branding remain intact when OpsPal updates
Changes are safely stored and automatically applied to new versions

entries.headline: RevOps assessments now automatically detect revenue fields and sales processes
details: Assessments identify your organization's primary revenue tracking fields
Analysis includes contract values, annual recurring revenue, and net new revenue metrics
Sales process segmentation provides targeted recommendations based on your setup

entries.headline: Windows setup process now works seamlessly with PowerShell
Initial setup experience runs more smoothly with better error handling
Salesforce deployments now prevent common configuration errors
details: Pre-deployment checks catch picklist and record type conflicts
Field history tracking limits are validated before deployment
Duplicate value settings are automatically merged to prevent failures

entries.headline: Automatic credential scanning prevents accidental exposure of sensitive data
Continuous monitoring now scans for exposed credentials and secrets
All hardcoded credentials removed for enhanced security
Salesforce deployment validation now works correctly in all scenarios
details: Flow logic analysis properly handles complex decision trees
Field reference validation correctly identifies issues across all flow branches
Deployment failures from validation cascades are now prevented

entries.headline: Marketo campaign validation now prevents activation errors
details: Campaign validation checks run before activation to catch issues early
Rate limit monitoring prevents campaigns from failing due to usage caps

entries.headline: Status displays now show OpsPal branding and environment information
OKR generation now incorporates strategic context for better alignment
details: Strategic objectives are analyzed before generating specific OKRs
Theme selection prioritizes initiatives that align with business strategy
Three-phase generation process ensures objectives support overall goals
